metadata.description: Unique GUID for this workbook instance.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Freshservice Sync Status

Monitors bidirectional sync between Microsoft Sentinel and Freshservice."},"name":"header"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timerange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000}]}}]},"name":"parameters"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Total=count(), Synced=countif(Labels has 'fs-ticket-'), Unsynced=countif(not(Labels has 'fs-ticket-'))
| extend SyncRate=strcat(round(100.0*Synced/Total,1),'%')","size":4,"title":"Sync Coverage","queryType":0,"visualization":"tiles"},"name":"coverage"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count=count() by Severity, bin(TimeGenerated,1h)
| order by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Incidents by Severity","queryType":0,"visualization":"barchart"},"name":"severity-chart"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Labels has 'fs-ticket-'
| extend FsTicketId=extract('fs-ticket-([0-9]+)',1,tostring(Labels))
| project IncidentNumber, Title, Severity, Status, FsTicketId, CreatedTime, LastModifiedTime
| order by LastModifiedTime desc
| take 100","size":0,"title":"Synced Incidents","queryType":0,"visualization":"table"},"name":"synced-table"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Status=='Closed'
| summarize ClosedBySentinel=countif(not(Labels has 'fs-ticket-')), ClosedViaFS=countif(Labels has 'fs-ticket-')","size":4,"title":"Closure Source (24h)","queryType":0,"visualization":"piechart"},"name":"closure-pie"}],"styleSettings":{},"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
